purpose: Synthetic staging board + agent MCP lifecycle smoke (no production-derived data)
schemaVersionNote: Expected latest registered migration package version (000..005). Synthetic fixture only — not a live DB readback of applied_versions.

rules: All planId/runId/idempotencyKey/agentId for a run MUST include the unique smokeRunId
Never reuse production run or plan ids
After smoke: set_run_status done when authorized; else mark residual RECONCILE_RUN
Do not DELETE board rows unless operator explicitly restores disposable snapshot
Never print or persist bearer tokens / CAIRN_BEARER_PRINCIPALS_JSON values

envContract.EXPECTED_SHA: 40-char release SHA; fail-closed vs healthz.deployedSha when set
envContract.STAGING_BEARER_TOKEN_REF: env var NAME holding bearer (default STAGING_BEARER_TOKEN); never log value

failClosed: EXPECTED_SHA set and healthz deployedSha mismatch
